CustomField.description: The relation type either Faculty, Student or Facility.
CustomField.formula:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Individual_Session_Enrollment__c )),
Individual_Session_Enrollment__r.RecordType.DeveloperName,
IF( NOT(ISBLANK( Contact__c )), TEXT( Contact__r.Contact_Type__c ), IF ( NOT(ISBLANK( Facility__c )), 'Facility', '' ) )
)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The relation type either Faculty, Student or Facility.
CustomField.label: Relation Type
